CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Ntc Of Mtn For Reasonable Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Chelsea Whelan, Esq. of the Law Office of Michael Heath, Tel. 415.931.4207, for plaintiff and moving party;
Bradley S. Hindley, Esq. of the Law Office of Bradley S. Hindley, Tel. 707.823.2951, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The Court did not consider defendant's late-filed opposition. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MAHENDRA SHAH's Motion For Reasonable Attorneys' Fees And Costs is Granted. No opposition filed. Defendant shall pay Plaintiff reasonable attorney's fees in the amount of $ 3,380.00. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHELSEA WHELAN OF THE LAW OFFICE OF MICHAEL HEATH, TEL. NO. 931-4207 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MAHENDRA SHAH's Motion For Entry Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Pursuant to the Stipulation for Entry of Judgment, judgment will be entered in favor of Plaintiff Mahendra Shah against defendant Urban Recycling Solutions, Inc. in the amount of $42,500.00.
